end-to-end 
customer 
retention
intelligence platform designed for telecom operators and data
teams. It transforms raw customer data into actionable churn
insights — no code required after deployment.
The platform trains and compares four machine learning models
(Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, and XGBoost)
on the IBM Telco Churn dataset, then surfaces results through a
clean, interactive dashboard.

a day-wise itinerary. The user provides inputs like
